subject: feat(ux,engine): comprehensive UX, mobile, PWA improvements + engine bug fixes
body:
Engine fixes:
- Disambiguate DD/MM vs MM/DD date format using value heuristics
- Generate meaningful prediction bands for sparse data (< 14 days)
- Fix quarterly pattern phase detection with > 6 month gaps
- Add percentage-based duplicate detection tolerance (0.5%)
- Expand currency symbol parsing (₩, ₪, ₱, ₫, ₴, ₸, ₺, ₼, ₽, ฿, CHF etc.)
- Add tag cache pruning for entries unused > 6 months
- Strengthen JSON import schema validation (description, tags, date format, patterns)

UX improvements:
- Mobile card layout for transactions (cards < sm, table >= sm)
- Skeleton loading states replacing spinners (dashboard, workspace list)
- Step indicator text labels + "Step X of 3" in import wizard
- Success toast + haptic feedback on import completion
- File upload feedback (name + size shown before parsing)
- Improved empty states (circular icon background, larger text)
- Bottom sheet menus on mobile for workspace actions
- First-use pulse hint on kebab menu button
- Responsive chart height (280/350/420px by breakpoint)
- 44px minimum touch targets on all interactive elements
- Modal edge spacing (max-w-[calc(100%-2rem)])
- Pull-to-refresh on workspace list
- Date format override dropdown in import step 1

PWA improvements:
- apple-mobile-web-app meta tags (status bar, title, splash)
- PWA share target registration for CSV/JSON files
- Install reminder banner for repeat users (3+ visits)
- Haptic feedback composable (subtle pulses on key actions)

Tests: 12 new tests covering disambiguation, tolerance, sparse bands,
quarterly gaps, constant series, zero balance runway.

Tags: ux, mobile, pwa, engine, forecast, import, a11y, test
Complexity: 4
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: ux-mobile-improvements
Semver: minor
